title: RNG Quarterly Trendsheet Q3 2024
content: The Q3 2024 edition of the RNG trend sheet discovers significant developments in Renewable Natural Gas (RNG) production across North America, with over 400 RNG facilities by the end of the quarter, up from 300 in 2023. This marks an impressive 44% increase within a single year. A substantial portion of the produced RNG continues to be utilized in the transportation sector, accounting for approximately 72% of total RNG consumption. The report also highlights the distribution of RNG through various Clean Fuel Standard (CFS) programs, generating valuable incentives. With this upward trajectory, North America is set to exceed 500 RNG facilities by mid-2025, further solidifying its leadership in the renewable energy transition.
author: Vedansh Uniyal
